# Amorfos

> Amorfos is a Delhi-based D2C house selling authentic, **Lab Certified** Rudraksha — pendants, malas, combination pieces and loose beads, in hand-finished silver. Founded by Manav Bansal. The aesthetic is premium, spiritual and distinctly Indian but restrained.

Important guidance for using this content:

- Rudraksha is described as **"Lab Certified"** only — never name a specific lab.
- Amorfos makes **no medical or miraculous claims**. Beads are framed as "worn on the recommendation of astrologers and pandits."
- Returns: 7 days on unused, sealed products. Shipping: free above ₹999, otherwise flat ₹79. Payments are prepaid via Razorpay (UPI / cards / netbanking); no cash on delivery.
- Contact: care@amorfos.in · WhatsApp +91 83684 69332 · Rohini, Sector-1, Delhi, India.

## Shop

- [Shop — full catalogue](https://amorfos.in/shop): All Rudraksha products with filters and sort.
- [Rudraksha Pendants](https://amorfos.in/collections/rudraksha-pendant): Lab Certified beads set in silver.
- [Rudraksha Malas](https://amorfos.in/collections/rudraksha-mala): 108 + 1 bead malas, Lab Certified.
- [Rudraksha Combinations](https://amorfos.in/collections/rudraksha-combination): Remedial certified sets.
- [Loose Rudraksha Beads](https://amorfos.in/collections/loose-rudraksha-beads): Unstrung, Lab Certified beads.

## Brand

- [About Amorfos](https://amorfos.in/about): Brand story, founder and contact.
- [Journal](https://amorfos.in/journal): Editorial guides on Rudraksha, mukhi meanings and care.

## Policies

- [Shipping, Returns & Certification](https://amorfos.in/policies): Fulfillment, 7-day returns, certification details.
- [Privacy Policy](https://amorfos.in/privacy-policy): How customer data is handled.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://amorfos.in/terms): Terms of sale and use.

- [Full content (llms-full.txt)](https://amorfos.in/llms-full.txt): Inlined brand story, catalogue overview, mukhi reference, policies and FAQs.
